findings.detail: Template choices are visible, but 4 options can still feel like a lot if I’m just trying to get started quickly.
findings.proposed_solution: Show a simple starting recommendation like “Best for wellness practices” so I can begin faster.

findings.detail: The chat box accepted my text, but it wasn’t obvious what happened next after I sent it.
findings.proposed_solution: After I send a chat message, show a visible reply or status so I know it heard me.

findings.detail: Save worked, but there was no clear confirmation that anything changed.
findings.proposed_solution: Give a stronger save confirmation, like “Saved” with a timestamp.

findings.detail: The device toggle exists, but it may add one more thing to notice before I feel done.
findings.proposed_solution: Label the device toggle more clearly as “Desktop / Mobile preview” so it feels obvious.

warnings.detail: Template choices are visible, but 4 options can still feel like a lot if I’m just trying to get started quickly.
The chat box accepted my text, but it wasn’t obvious what happened next after I sent it.
Save worked, but there was no clear confirmation that anything changed.
The device toggle exists, but it may add one more thing to notice before I feel done.
